--- title: "Daily Farm Brief – 24 February 2026" date: 2026-02-24T06:00:00Z description: "Today's farming updates: Scotland heavy rain warning, SFI payment changes, strong lamb prices, new equipment grants" tags: ["daily-brief", "uk-farming", "weather", "grants", "markets"] type: brief --- # 📰 Daily Farm Brief – 24 February 2026 > Your 3-minute roundup of today's important farming updates. --- ## 🌧 Weather Risk - **Scotland**: Heavy rain expected across Highlands tomorrow – field work suspended, flooding risk low-lying areas - **Midlands**: Frost risk overnight, temps down to -1°C – protect tender crops, check livestock housing - **South West**: Good conditions for field work – suitable for spraying and field prep - **East Anglia**: Dry conditions – ideal for machinery work and soil prep --- ## 💰 Grant Update - **SFI**: Payment schedule changes announced for Countryside Stewardship – check your agreements - **Farming Investment Fund**: New round opens for equipment and technology – deadline 31 March 2026 - **RPA**: New livestock unit calculation tool released – available on gov.uk - **Farming Resilience Fund**: Applications open until 15 March – 19 days left --- ## 📈 Market Watch - **Wheat**: £165/t (feed) 📈 +£2.50 | £185/t (milling) 📈 +£2.00 - **Barley**: £155/t (feed) 📉 -£1.00 - **Rapeseed**: £420/t 📈 +£5.00 - **Milk**: £0.38/L 📈 +1p - **Livestock**: Hereford cattle £4.25/kg 📈 +8p | Worcester lamb £2.85/kg 📈 +15p --- ## 🚜 Equipment & Tech - **Farming Investment Fund** now open for equipment applications - **Spring machinery maintenance** – book services now before busy season - **Drill calibration** – check seed rates before spring drilling --- ## ⚠️ Key Alerts 1. **Scotland farmers**: Prepare for heavy rain tomorrow 2. **Midlands**: Frost protection needed overnight 3. **Grant deadlines**: 31 March (FIF) & 15 March (Resilience Fund) 4. **Spring drilling**: Soil testing recommended before March --- ## 📊 Today's Numbers | Metric | Value | Trend | |--------|-------|-------| | Wheat price | £165/t | 📈 Up | | Lamb price | £2.85/kg | 📈 Up | | Rain risk (Scot) | 85% | ⚠️ High | | Frost risk (Mid) | -1°C | ⚠️ Moderate | --- *Generated by UK Farm Content Swarm • Sources: Met Office, DEFRA, AHDB, RPA • Updated: 24 Feb 2026 06:00 UTC*
